summary: Role 3 native instruction authority/drift review completed read-only. Verdict: REVISE_REQUIRED because current docs/code state user-instruction-over-memory as a principle, but do not implement or gate AGENTS/CLAUDE/custom instruction surface scanning or native_memory_drift/wrong_memory_reference evidence.
decisions: Return REVISE_REQUIRED for P0-05 until native instruction authority scanning is implemented and included in completion gates.
Configured hook/MCP checks are not equivalent to scanning AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md/settings, custom instructions, and bootstrap surfaces for conflicts with OS memory.
The completion plan should require inspectable drift artifacts and verifier failures for conflicting native instructions.
next_steps: Add a native instruction authority scanner for AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md/settings, Codex custom instruction/config/bootstrap surfaces, and managed/user hook instruction surfaces.
Emit native_memory_drift and wrong_memory_reference style findings with source path, conflicting memory path, severity, and recommended resolution.
Add native authority status to OS_COMPLETION_CONDITIONS, VERIFICATION, health status, status refresh, and verify:goal.
